purpose: Track the Scene Editor core split required before wider cross-app linking work.
knownGoodState: Runtime module cleanup completed after the v0.30 core split. The six remaining numbered runtime feature modules were renamed to permanent ownership-based filenames, index.html loads only permanent runtime names plus the scene-editor-v2.js bootstrap, v11/v15 stale v0.28 helper toast prefixes now derive from the active core/config version, and v0.31 cache labels are synced across active loads. HTTP asset checks, syntax checks, template manifest fetch, and a temporary Playwright smoke test passed.
blockerRule: Two failed attempts means the item becomes blocked and moves to uploaded local file, agent/Codex, or proper local branch workflow. No placeholders, no patch-on-patch workaround, no manual reconstruction from truncated chunks.

tasks.title: Verify stable baseline before core split
tasks.description: Fresh URL loads after recovery. The editor restores the local backup, displays the scene, preserves transform controls, and shows the current v0.29-title-cache-sync runtime state.

tasks.title: Extract Scene Editor config constants
tasks.description: scene-editor-config.js exists, loads before the core, and scene-editor-v2.js consumes it for version, storage keys, repo/app paths, brand asset paths, template manifest path, and type options. This phase is confirmed working.

tasks.title: Extract local storage helpers
tasks.description: scene-editor-storage.js is now consumed by scene-editor-app.js for settings, working copy, and download stamp read/write while preserving the existing localStorage keys.

tasks.title: Extract scene model helpers
tasks.description: scene-editor-scene-model.js owns blank scene creation, collection lookup, item lookup, background path mutation, normalisation, default element/layer creation, duplicate/remove, and path data mutations.

tasks.title: Extract import/export IO
tasks.description: Move local JSON import, URL import, template loading, template manifest loading, and JSON download into scene-editor-io.js without changing the current loose JSON behaviour yet.

tasks.title: Extract core move-drag controller
tasks.description: Move only centre/move handle drag behaviour into scene-editor-stage-drag.js and verify it does not conflict with offscreen placement, transform controls, or value sliders.

tasks.title: Extract renderer and markup helpers
tasks.description: Move markup and render helpers into scene-editor-renderer.js only after state/model/IO/drag are stable. This is the riskiest split because many helper modules depend on generated IDs/classes.

tasks.title: Extract DOM bindings
tasks.description: Move form/menu/context/stage binding code into scene-editor-bindings.js after renderer extraction is stable.

tasks.title: Extract app coordinator and public core API
tasks.description: Create scene-editor-app.js and scene-editor-core-api.js so other modules and later cross-app linking work can depend on a stable public Scene Editor bridge instead of reaching into a tangled core file.

tasks.title: Rename remaining numbered feature modules to permanent runtime names
tasks.description: Renamed the six retained numbered runtime modules to permanent ownership-based filenames, updated index.html load paths, removed stale v0.28 helper version/toast prefixes, and verified v0.31 runtime-module cleanup over HTTP and Playwright smoke testing.

tasks.title: Confirm Scene Editor is ready for cross-app linking
tasks.description: Scene Editor cleanup is complete through v0.31 runtime-module cleanup. Later cross-app active-project/reference/index integration can begin as a separate phase; no cross-app behavior was changed in this cleanup pass.

tasks.title: Archive unused legacy Scene Editor files
tasks.description: Archived unused unreferenced legacy files into archive/legacy-2026-05-28 after confirming index.html active load list and active-code references.

taskCommits: 8d0fcec Split Scene Editor core into modular files and archive legacy helpers
current v0.31 runtime module cleanup commit
